overall.description: A static nighttime scene from a video game depicting heavy rainfall outside a traditional wooden building in a rural village setting. The atmosphere is dark and ominous with limited visibility due to the intense rain and night conditions, creating a cinematic survival-horror ambiance with no visible characters or movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior courtyard of traditional building during heavy rainstorm

agents.ego_description: stationary first-person perspective observing the rainy night scene outside the traditional building

entered.detail: multi-level wooden structure with overhanging roofs and vertical support posts, partially illuminated
dark silhouettes of trees forming a dense forest backdrop
wet earth ground reflecting minimal light from the rainy conditions
heavy rainfall visible as vertical streaks throughout the entire scene

segments.scene_description: A completely static first-person view from a video game showing heavy rainfall at night outside a traditional tiered wooden building. The scene is enveloped in darkness with limited visibility, featuring a muddy ground in the foreground and dense trees in the background. No characters or movement occur beyond the falling rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective of a dark, rain-drenched rural environment that remains shrouded in an ominous nighttime atmosphere. It begins with a view of heavy rainfall cascading around a traditional tiered wooden building, where the darkness severely limits visibility. As the rain continues to fall, the camera captures the muddy ground in the immediate foreground and the silhouettes of dense trees looming in the background. The scene remains frozen in this desolate state, with the only movement being the relentless downpour against the silent, wooden architecture.
